changes.summary: New BC-12 EstablishSessionUseCase centralizes inv-09 JWT/session cookie establishment (establishJwtSession full mode, establishOAuthSession oauth mode) and inv-23 fake auth gating (fakeDataMode || testAuthMode). Fake user/superadmin flows resolve session ids, authenticate, set JWT and session cookies. Exports createEstablishSessionUseCase factory for tRPC.

Thinned REST auth: fake/superadmin endpoints delegate to EstablishSessionUseCase; all post-auth cookie writes (OAuth, passkey, SMS/email/call verify, mock, magic link) use establishJwtSession or establishOAuthSession instead of inline cookieManager.establishJwtAuth.

Thinned tRPC fake auth: authenticateFake and authenticateFakeSuperadmin delegate to EstablishSessionUseCase via factory; FakeAuthDisabledError maps to TRPC FORBIDDEN. tRPC now shares inv-23 gating with REST (testAuthMode enabled).

notes: EstablishSessionUseCase not registered in _bootstrap.ts (outside write_set); AuthController constructs instance in constructor, auth.router uses createEstablishSessionUseCase factory. Logout/clear-cookies remain direct CookieManager calls. OAuth init/callback URL building stays in controller for p6a-oauth-ucs follow-up.
